SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:04AM
Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Andy Christoforidis, respondent, appears in Pro Per; Marc Alexander Bortolussi, appellant, appears in Pro Per. (Mr. Bortolussi's son appears with him.) Parties are sworn as witnesses and testify in the narrative. The Court reviews evidence. Some evidence is marked and some is returned.
